title: helenium alternifolium
intro: Helenium alternifolium, also known as Sneezeweed or Yellow Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helenium alternifolium include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as colds and congestion, as well as its use as a natural antihistamine. Helenium alternifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
